data.content: Fixed parent knots Scene action failure. Root cause: parent beats in knots repos were forced through Scene orchestration mode which asserts child claimability — fails because knots children may not be claimable. Fix introduces effectiveParent flag in terminal-manager.ts that routes knots parents through single-beat Take path instead. UI updated to show Take! (blue) for knots parents, Scene! (purple) for beads parents. BeatWithRepo enriched with _memoryManagerType for client-side detection. 6 files changed, 142 insertions. All 1994 tests pass, lint/typecheck/build clean.
